categories.label: Architecture & Interior
categories.description: Architectural design and interior projects ranging from residential to commercial and public buildings.

subcategories.label: Projects
subcategories.description: Design projects across residential, retail, hospitality and workspace typologies.

subcategories.label: Residential
subcategories.description: Private living spaces and residential building design.

subcategories.label: Retail
subcategories.description: Spatial identities for retail environments including cafes, bookstores and shops.

subcategories.label: Hospitality
subcategories.description: Hotel, restaurant and hospitality interiors focused on atmosphere and experience.

subcategories.label: Workspace
subcategories.description: Office and studio environments designed for focus, collaboration and culture.

subcategories.label: Practice
subcategories.description: Interior architecture and design practice across residential, hospitality and retail projects.

categories.label: Craft & Design
categories.description: Furniture, spatial objects and branded environments. Work spanning custom joinery, display systems and material identity.

categories.label: Spatial Media
categories.description: Immersive environments, interactive spaces and extended reality experiences.

subcategories.label: Immersive Environments
subcategories.description: Virtual reality, 360° film, fulldome and audio-visual environments designed for spatial experience.

subcategories.label: Interactive Spaces
subcategories.description: Game environments, spatial installations and interactive systems developed across digital and physical space.

categories.label: Moving Images
categories.description: Film, animation and moving image works.

subcategories.label: Film & Documentary
subcategories.description: Essayistic documentary films exploring migration, memory and cultural history.

subcategories.label: Sequences
subcategories.description: 3D animations, stop-motion works, motion graphics and experimental video sequences. Projects spanning architectural visualization, material exploration and moving image experiments.

subcategories.label: Architecture
subcategories.description: Photographs of built environments, interiors and urban space.

subcategories.label: Street
subcategories.description: Candid photography from cities across Europe, Asia and the Middle East.

subcategories.label: Portrait
subcategories.description: Portraits made across documentary, editorial and personal contexts.

categories.label: Sound
categories.description: Sound collages, podcasts and radio broadcasts.

subcategories.label: Soundscape
subcategories.description: Environmental and spatial sound compositions designed for installation and place-based listening.

subcategories.label: Podcasts
subcategories.description: Conversations on architecture, media art and spatial culture.

subcategories.label: Radio
subcategories.description: Broadcasts and archival recordings from independent radio platforms.
